creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 256776
Patch for libboard

* Remove USES= localbase
* Remove USE_CXXSTD (already defined by project)
* Remove if statement (not needed)
* Adjust patch
* Run tests in build dir to avoid plist issues

Poudriere testport OK 14.2-RELEASE and 13.4-RELEASE
make test also appears to work as expected (it doesn't output any errors at least)

Note: Previous update didn't update to 0.9.6 but kept the old version due to GH_TAGNAME begin left in port Makefile
